name: renotify-email
description: Sends a reminder email to ${variables.alert_email} for a suspended run still awaiting acknowledgement. Triggered by the renotify Kafka topic produced by the workflow_prod TimescaleDB job renotify_sweep (which owns the cadence + per-run throttle). Install per-tenant; set alert_email.

parameters.subject: Reminder: an alert is still unacknowledged
parameters.title: Reminder: unacknowledged alert
parameters.html:
A ${inputs.event.workflow_type} alert in your workspace is still unacknowledged (reminder #${inputs.event.reminder_number}).

Open your Gen0Sec dashboard to review and acknowledge it.
